title: A New AI That Saves Energy and Works Better
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) uses a lot of electricity in the United States, which is not good for the environment. Scientists have made a new type of AI that can use 100 times less energy while doing tasks better. This AI is called neuro-symbolic AI, and it helps robots see, understand, and act in the real world. For example, it can help a robot stack blocks without making mistakes. The new AI combines two ways of thinking: one that learns from data and one that uses rules, like how people solve problems. This makes robots faster and more accurate. The research will be shared at a big conference in Vienna. This breakthrough is important because it helps save energy and makes AI smarter for robots.

keywords.explanation: A computer system that can think and learn like a person
The power that makes things work, like electricity
A new type of AI that mixes learning and rules to work better
Machines that can move and do tasks on their own
A big meeting where scientists share their work

questions.question: What does the new AI save a lot of?
How much less energy can the new AI use?
What is the name of the new AI?
What does the new AI help robots do?
Where will the research be presented?

background_read: AI is like a smart computer that can learn and do things, but it uses a lot of electricity, which can harm the planet. Scientists are trying to make AI better by creating new types that use less power and make fewer mistakes. This article talks about one such new AI that helps robots work more efficiently.
Article_Structure: WHO: Scientists at a School of Engineering, led by Matthias Scheutz
WHAT: Created a new AI called neuro-symbolic AI that uses 100 times less energy and improves accuracy
WHERE: Research will be presented at a conference in Vienna
WHY: To save energy and make AI systems for robots work better and faster

perspectives.description: The new AI helps reduce electricity use, which is good for protecting the Earth.
